name: Budwix Cream
recipeInstructions:
Budwix is a mixture of millet, almonds and flax seed. You can use plain yogurt or Quark cheese instead of cottage cheese. Other seasonal fruits can be used instead of a banana.
In a blender, grind the grain-and-nut mixture until homogeneous but gritty.
Add oil, cottage cheese, lemon juice, honey and fruit to the mixture in the blender. Blend until smooth and serve immediately.
